MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.

CSR: B. Fields #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq. for Plaintiff: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC..
Plaintiff's Witness SANDOVAL was placed under oath and direct examined.
DEFENDANT LUIS A. GONZALEZ PRESENT AND UNDER OATH.

Damages - $8726.30
Costs - $315.00
Total - $9041.30

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
